# Changelog

All notable changes to Wick are documented here.

---

## [v0.1.8](https://github.com/yogasw/wick/releases/tag/v0.1.8)

_Released on 2026-04-19_

### Improved
- Automated synchronization of changelog entries with project documentation.
- CI workflow updates to utilize admin tokens and flags for automated pull request management.
- Tag comparison links in changelog documentation for improved version traceability.
- Synchronization of `go.mod.tmpl` and changelog files for release consistency.

## [v0.1.8](https://github.com/yogasw/wick/releases/tag/v0.1.8)

_Released on 2026-04-19_

### Added
- Compare tag links to changelog entries in the documentation.

### Improved
- Automated synchronization of changelog entries into documentation files.
- Updated release workflow to automatically sync documentation changelogs and removed the legacy root-level changelog file.
- Enhanced CI security and automation by using an administrative token for pull request creation, approval, and merging.
- Refined CI merging logic to utilize administrative flags and remove manual self-approval requirements.
- Synchronized `go.mod.tmpl` and changelog metadata across multiple release versions.

---
*This summary was automatically generated by Gemini AI*

## [v0.1.8](https://github.com/yogasw/wick/releases/tag/v0.1.8)

_Released on 2026-04-19_

### Added
- Automated comparison tag links for documentation changelog entries.
- Support for `ADMIN_TOKEN` to automate pull request creation, approval, and merging.

### Improved
- CI/CD workflow to synchronize documentation on release and remove manual self-approval requirements.
- Repository structure by migrating changelog content to `docs/changelog.md` and removing the root `CHANGELOG.md`.
- Release synchronization processes for `go.mod.tmpl` and project documentation.

## [v0.1.8](https://github.com/yogasw/wick/releases/tag/v0.1.8)

_Released on 2026-04-19_

### Improved
- Automated synchronization of `go.mod.tmpl` and changelog entries during the release process.
- Streamlined documentation updates by automatically syncing changelog data to the documentation directory.
- Enhanced CI/CD workflows to utilize administrative tokens for automated creation, approval, and merging of synchronization pull requests.
- Added comparison tag links to documentation changelog entries for better version traceability.
- Refined release automation by removing self-approval requirements and implementing administrative merge flags.

_Released on 2026-04-19_

### Improved
- Automated changelog synchronization to documentation.
- Streamlined CI workflow by migrating changelog management to centralized documentation.
- Enhanced CI automation using administrative tokens and flags for PR creation, approval, and merging.
- Integrated comparison tag links into changelog entries for better version traceability.

## [v0.1.0](https://github.com/yogasw/wick/releases/tag/v0.1.0)

Initial public release.

### Added

- `wick init <name>` — scaffold a new project from template, auto-run `go mod tidy` + `go run . setup`
- `wick.yml` cross-platform task runner — `setup`, `dev`, `build`, `test`, `tidy`, `generate`
- Tool modules (`tools/<name>/`) — mount at `/tools/{key}`, typed `Config` with `wick:"..."` tags
- Background job modules (`jobs/<name>/`) — operator surface `/jobs/{key}` + admin surface `/manager/jobs/{key}`
- Tag system — group and filter tools/jobs with `DefaultTag`, admin-managed
- Visibility control — `VisibilityPublic` / `VisibilityPrivate` per tool
- Runtime config — `Config` structs reflected into admin-editable `configs` table rows
- SSO support — configurable from `/admin/configs`, no redeploy needed
- AES-GCM stateless sessions — per-job access, theme cookie persistence
- Tailwind CSS + templ — standalone Tailwind CLI (no Node.js), type-safe Go templates
- Claude Code integration — `agent.md` + Claude skills shipped with every `wick init` project
- External link cards — register URL shortcuts as tool cards via `RegisterToolNoConfig`
- Dark/light theme — user preference persisted via cookie
